catalogData.name: Earth
properties: Physical Resistance, Cold Immunity, Acid Vulnerability
Unphased (can't gain Frightened or Wounded status)

powers.name: Infuse Mana
powers.raw: Infuse Mana (Trait): +Force/2 on Manipulation spell Drain tests

powers.name: Sustain Spell
powers.raw: Sustain Spell (No Action, Sustained): Sustain one Manipulation spell for you. Spell Force must be ≤ elemental's Force.
powers.text: Sustain one Manipulation spell for you. Spell Force must be ≤ elemental's Force.

evolvedPowers.name: Banishing Resistance
evolvedPowers.raw: Banishing Resistance (Trait): Double Force vs. Negate

evolvedPowers.name: Crush
evolvedPowers.raw: Crush (Complex Action): Cast Shatter at Force. Only targets objects.
evolvedPowers.text: Cast Shatter at Force. Only targets objects.

evolvedPowers.name: Soft Landing
evolvedPowers.raw: Soft Landing (Interrupt Action): Reduce your fall damage by (Force x 5)m.
evolvedPowers.text: Reduce your fall damage by (Force x 5)m.

elementalFormulaePower.name: Elemental Formulae
elementalFormulaePower.raw: Elemental Formulae (Complex Action, Sustained): 1 SpellType alchemical preparation does not count against limit. Spell Force must be ≤ elemental's Force.
elementalFormulaePower.text: 1 SpellType alchemical preparation does not count against limit. Spell Force must be ≤ elemental's Force.

greatFormPowers.name: Binding Roots
greatFormPowers.raw: Binding Roots (No Action, Sustained): When melee attack hits, cast Bind at Force
greatFormPowers.text: When melee attack hits, cast Bind at Force

greatFormPowers.name: Concussive Force
greatFormPowers.raw: Concussive Force (Complex Action): Cast Powerball at Force centered on self. Can't use if already used in this Combat Turn or Turn before.
greatFormPowers.text: Cast Powerball at Force centered on self. Can't use if already used in this Combat Turn or Turn before.
